apis.name: @State
apis.purpose: 组件内状态装饰器，标记为响应式状态变量

apis.name: @Prop
apis.purpose: 父组件单向数据传递装饰器

apis.name: @Link
apis.purpose: 父组件双向数据绑定装饰器

apis.name: @Provide
apis.purpose: 跨组件状态提供装饰器

apis.name: @Consume
apis.purpose: 跨组件状态消费装饰器

apis.name: @Watch
apis.purpose: 状态变量变化监听装饰器

apis.name: @Builder
apis.purpose: 自定义构建函数装饰器

apis.name: @ObjectLink
apis.purpose: 子组件中观察@Observed装饰类实例的装饰器

apis.name: AppStorage
apis.purpose: 应用全局UI状态存储，提供跨页面/组件状态共享

apis.name: LocalStorage
apis.purpose: 页面级UI状态存储，提供页面内状态共享

apis.name: PersistentStorage
apis.purpose: 持久化存储UI状态，数据写入磁盘持久化

apis.name: Environment
apis.purpose: 设备环境查询，获取系统环境变量

apis.name: ForEach
apis.purpose: 基于数组的循环渲染接口

apis.name: Repeat
apis.purpose: 基于数组的循环渲染（API 12+，支持虚拟滚动）

apis.name: @Entry
apis.purpose: 页面入口装饰器，标识自定义组件为UI页面入口

notableFindings: @State, @Prop, @Link, @Provide, @Consume, @Builder, @ObjectLink, @StorageLink decorators have no standalone API reference doc files in this repository — they are documented in the HarmonyOS developer guides only
The @ohos.arkui.StateManagement module (import from @kit.ArkUI) provides AppStorageV2, PersistenceV2, and UIUtils for state management V2
@Env decorator is API 22+ and reads system properties (e.g. BREAK_POINT); the Environment API is the older V1 approach for device environment query
Repeat (API 12+) is the recommended replacement for ForEach in virtual scrolling scenarios
ProvideOptions (allowOverride) is the only V1 decorator parameter with a dedicated reference doc
